raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Context check","name":"What feels most important to talk through today, Carl?","description":"Lets Carl set the frame before the manager goes deeper.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"CoE limp point","name":"Where has the CoE lost the most momentum lately?","description":"Surfaces the specific place the CoE has gone soft rather than treating it as a general issue.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Partner pull","name":"Which partner relationship is doing the most to slow the CoE down?","description":"Finds the external dependency or misalignment that is weakening pull on the work.","purpose":"competency","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Ownership handoff","name":"What are you still holding on to that could move through someone else?","description":"Tests whether Carl is over-owning CoE execution instead of building distributed ownership.","purpose":"competency","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Priority bet","name":"What is the CoE's next real bet?","description":"Forces a concrete priority choice rather than a vague list of work.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Momentum blocker","name":"What is keeping that from moving faster?","description":"Gets at the one constraint holding the chosen CoE bet back.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Update usefulness","name":"How are your CoE updates landing with the people you need?","description":"Checks whether his communication is creating pull and action or just visibility.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision signal","name":"What decision do you want to force in the next update?","description":"Surfaces whether the next communication is built to drive action, not just report status.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next two weeks","name":"What would make the next two weeks feel sharper for you?","description":"Closes by turning the check-in into a concrete near-term adjustment.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Concrete takeaway","name":"What's the first thing you'll change before we talk again?","description":"Ends on a specific commitment the manager can revisit next time.","purpose":"competency","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
